board.name: Sariko MVP — Apr 18, 2026
board.desc:
Community marketplace for Filipino homemade food in HCMC. Deadline: April 18, 2026.

Tags: [FE] Frontend · [BE] Backend · [Infra] Infrastructure · [Svc] Third-party Service

cards.name: [Svc] Lalamove Integration
cards.desc:
Waiting for sandbox credentials from CEO.

Needs:
- [BE] Quotation API (delivery fee)
- [BE] Place Order (auto-book on seller 'Ready')
- [BE] Webhook handler (driver status)
- [FE] Dynamic delivery fee on cart page (currently shows '--')
- [FE] Delivery status on order detail

cards.name: [Svc] VNPay Sandbox Testing
cards.desc:
Error: 'Ngân hàng thanh toán không được hỗ trợ'
Suspected: merchant account not configured on VNPay sandbox portal.

To fix:
- Check sandbox portal: sandbox.vnpayment.vn/merchantv2
- Verify TMN Code matches .env.local
- Confirm NCB payment method is enabled
- Verify merchant is Active

cards.name: [Svc] Goong Maps API Key
cards.desc:
Account activation process changed at maps.goong.io — pending activation.

Needed for: address search autocomplete (currently using Nominatim as fallback).
Swap is 1 function in AddressForm.vue when key arrives.

cards.name: [BE] CORS — Restrict to production domain
cards.desc:
backend/src/main.py line 81
Change: allow_origins='*'
To: allow_origins=['https://sariko.store', 'https://www.sariko.store']

Wait until frontend domain is confirmed before doing this.

cards.name: [FE] Dashboard — Seller role guard
cards.desc:
frontend/src/plugins/router.js
/dashboard route only checks requiresAuth, not seller role.
Any logged-in user can access the seller dashboard.

Fix: check user.isSeller in beforeEach, redirect to /home if not seller.

cards.name: [FE] Policy pages — Legal content
cards.desc:
Pages exist as placeholder:
- /account/terms (TermsPage.vue)
- /account/privacy (PrivacyPage.vue)

Waiting: legal team delivers content April 14, 2026.
Action: paste content into i18n/locales/vi.json + en-PH.json

cards.name: [Infra] Production smoke test
cards.desc:
Full E2E test on live:
- Browse sellers (public, no auth)
- Sign up / Sign in
- Add to cart
- Place order
- VNPay payment flow
- Seller dashboard receives order
- Order status update
- Cancel order

cards.name: [Infra] Seed demo data
cards.desc:
3-5 seller profiles + menus for launch demo.
To be done by CEO/Ops by Apr 16.

cards.name: [FE] Address Autocomplete (Nominatim → Goong)
cards.desc:
AddressForm.vue rewritten:
✅ Search input with debounce 350ms
✅ Nominatim autocomplete (Vietnam)
✅ Dropdown suggestions
✅ GPS fallback button
✅ Static map preview after selection (Leaflet)

Pending: swap Nominatim → Goong when API key arrives (1 function swap in searchAddress())

cards.name: [FE] Home page
cards.desc: Browse sellers, founding sellers 2-col grid (cap 4 + See All → /sellers), featured dishes (6-item limit), skeleton loading, public (no auth required).

cards.name: [FE] All Sellers page
cards.desc: Full founding sellers list in 2-col grid. Uses LayoutBaseSettings. Reuses sellerStore data from home — no extra API call if already loaded.

cards.name: [FE] Seller page
cards.desc: Seller info, full menu grouped by category, category filter, section-level skeleton, empty menu state. Public (no auth required).

cards.name: [FE] Cart page (merged with Checkout)
cards.desc: Add/remove items, qty +/-, single-seller conflict modal, delivery address, order note, place order. Cart = Checkout (ShopeeFood style). No separate checkout route.

cards.name: [FE] Auth — Sign in / Sign up
cards.desc: Email/password auth via Supabase. Enter key support, loading states, session restore on refresh, cart preload on login, cart clear on signout.

cards.name: [FE] Onboarding
cards.desc: Phone, delivery address (Leaflet map + GPS), language preference. Persisted via PATCH /users/me/profile.

cards.name: [FE] Order confirmation / detail page
cards.desc: Status-aware: pending/confirmed/ready/done/cancelled + awaiting payment state. Cancel button with dialog. Pay Now retry button. VND formatting.

cards.name: [FE] Order history (My Orders)
cards.desc: Filter tabs: All / Unpaid / Active / Completed / Cancelled. Order cards with Unpaid badge. Wired to GET /orders API.

cards.name: [FE] Account page + sub-pages
cards.desc:
Profile header (centered layout, 88px avatar, camera badge, edit profile pill).
Info section: email, phone, language rows.
Sub-pages: Edit Profile, Delivery Address (autocomplete + static map), Language, Terms, Privacy.
Layout: LayoutBaseSettings for all sub-pages.

cards.name: [FE] VNPay payment flow
cards.desc:
Opens VNPay in new tab, navigates to order confirmation after return.
Pay Now retry on order detail.
Payment return page: success/failed states.

cards.name: [FE] Route guards + i18n
cards.desc:
requiresAuth: cart, orders, dashboard, account, onboarding.
guestOnly: signin, signup.
Vietnamese localization: vi.json 100% in sync with en-PH.json.
Bottom nav hidden on: cart, order detail, payment return, auth, onboarding.

cards.name: [FE] Seller Dashboard
cards.desc: Wired to real APIs. Shows only paid orders (payment_status='paid'). Order list, order detail, status update (pending→confirmed→ready→done + cancel).

cards.name: [BE] Sellers APIs
cards.desc:
GET /sellers/founding — public
GET /sellers/{slug} — public
GET /sellers/{slug}/menu — public
All auth removed for public browsing.

cards.name: [BE] Cart APIs
cards.desc:
POST /cart/add (single-seller constraint, duplicate merge)
PATCH /cart/update (qty > 0)
DELETE /cart/remove/{food_item_id}
DELETE /cart/clear

cards.name: [BE] Order APIs (buyer)
cards.desc:
POST /orders (snapshot items, clear cart, rollback on failure)
GET /orders (list)
GET /orders/{id} (detail)
PATCH /orders/{id}/cancel (pending only)

cards.name: [BE] Seller Dashboard APIs
[BE] VNPay payment flow
cards.desc:
POST /payments/vnpay/create — payment URL (HMAC-SHA512 signed)
GET /payments/vnpay/ipn — server-to-server IPN (idempotency check, updates payment_status)
GET /payments/vnpay/return — browser return (hash validation, display only, no DB writes)

cards.name: [BE] Users API
cards.desc:
GET /users/info/me — profile
PATCH /users/me/profile — update profile + upsert delivery address + avatar_url

cards.name: [Infra] AWS EC2 Deployment
cards.desc:
Backend deployed to AWS EC2.
nginx configured.
SSL via certbot.
DNS: api.sariko.store → backend.

cards.name: [FE] Referral Program — UI
cards.desc:
Referral link sharing, invite friends flow, reward status tracker.
Depends on: [BE] Referral Program — Backend.

cards.name: [BE] Referral Program — Backend
cards.desc:
Referral code generation, tracking table, reward credit logic.
DB tables: referrals, referral_rewards.

cards.name: [FE] Multi-tier Subscription — UI
cards.desc:
Subscription plan picker (Free / Pro / Premium), plan comparison, upgrade/downgrade flow.
Depends on: [BE] Multi-tier Subscription — Backend.

cards.name: [BE] Multi-tier Subscription — Backend
cards.desc:
Subscription plans table, per-user plan tracking, feature gating by plan.
Consider: VNPay recurring or manual renewal.

cards.name: [BE] Store Slug Auto Generator
cards.desc:
Auto-generate seller slug from store name on registration (e.g. 'Bánh Mì Hoa' → 'banh-mi-hoa').
Handle collisions with numeric suffix (e.g. 'banh-mi-hoa-2').
Expose slug preview in seller onboarding UI.

cards.name: [FE] Reviews & Ratings
cards.desc:
Star rating + comment on completed orders.
Review display on seller page + dish cards.
Depends on: [BE] Reviews API.

cards.name: [BE] Reviews API
cards.desc:
POST /reviews — create after order complete
GET /sellers/{slug}/reviews — list reviews
Average rating computed on read or stored field.

cards.name: [FE] Push Notifications
cards.desc:
In-app notification list (NotificationsPage.vue — currently empty placeholder).
Push: order status updates for buyer, new order alert for seller.
Depends on: [BE] notifications API or Supabase Realtime.

cards.name: [FE] Pickup vs Delivery toggle
cards.desc:
Cart page: let buyer choose delivery or self-pickup.
Pickup removes address + delivery fee fields.
Currently hardcoded to 'delivery'.

cards.name: [FE] Food Detail Page
cards.desc:
Dedicated /food/:sellerId/:foodId route exists in router but page is stub.
Show dish image, description, allergens, add-to-cart with qty selector.

cards.name: [Svc] Lalamove — Full Integration
cards.desc:
Full delivery booking after [Svc] Lalamove credentials are unblocked.
- Quotation API (show fee on cart)
- Place Order (auto-book when seller marks Ready)
- Webhook (driver status → order detail page)

cards.name: [Infra] MOIT Business Registration
cards.desc:
Register business entity for MOIT e-commerce notification.
Required before public launch.
Depends on: legal/ops team.

cards.name: [BE] GET /sellers/ listing
cards.desc:
Public endpoint to list all sellers (currently stub with just `pass`).
Not used by any frontend page yet.
